rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments
Ensure type consistency in AGREE declarations (int, real, bool)
Write deterministic dependency guarantees relating visible inputs to visible outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
